🍳

晚餐 recipes

Thai Medium medium

泰式青咖喱

Thai Green Curry

💰
Budget
$95
⏱️
Time
25 min
👥
Serves
4 people
📊
Difficulty
medium
gluten-free low-carb

Aromatic Thai green curry with vegetables and coconut milk

🥗 Ingredients 材料

  • 1 400ml light coconut milk
  • 2 3 tbsp green curry paste
  • 3 500g chicken breast, sliced
  • 4 1 cup Thai basil leaves
  • 5 1 eggplant, sliced
  • 6 1 red bell pepper, sliced
  • 7 2 tbsp fish sauce
  • 8 1 tbsp stevia
  • 9 Jasmine rice for serving

👨‍🍳 Steps 步驟

  1. 1 Heat 1/4 cup coconut milk in a pot. Add curry paste, stir until fragrant.
  2. 2 Add chicken, cook until no longer pink, about 5 minutes.
  3. 3 Pour in remaining coconut milk, add fish sauce and sweetener.
  4. 4 Add eggplant and bell pepper, simmer for 10 minutes.
  5. 5 Stir in Thai basil leaves.
  6. 6 Serve over jasmine rice.

💡 Tips 提示

Use light coconut milk to reduce calories and fat content.
